title: Flatwing
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Flatwings''' were creatures found on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] that built symmetrical nests. The shape of their nests looked as if they were made by a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] creature.

While exploring [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]], Sulonese [[Morgan Katarn]] observed some symmetrical burrowings on the ground; although he thought that an animal could make them, thinking of his native flatwings, a [[Force vision/Legends|premonition]] insisted that they were made by a sentient.<ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''
